titleStmt.title: SII 10.295: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 295. (A.R. No. 254 of 1924.) ON A SLAB LYING CLOSE TO THE STREAM AT AḌAVIRĀVULAPĀḌU, NANDIGĀMA TALUK, KRISHNA DISTRICT. Ś. 1164. (Śubhakṛit)

summary.p: Mentions grants of land made by Drōṇādula Pōti-Nāyuḍu and others to god Rāmanātha-Mahādēva at Rāvulapāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1164 Agu nēṁṭi śu
bhakrutsaṁvatsara vaiśākha śudda 5 guruvāramuna
rāvulapāṭi rāmanāta śrīmahādēvuniki pū¨rvvadatti kha 3 .
drōṇādula pōtināyuṁḍu koṁḍakaṁcitervu tamurucenapeṭicēṁ gra
yamu koni peṭina cēnu na 2 nitya Aḍeṁḍu biyyamu paḍi Anarapa
nāyuṁḍunu prōlināyuṁḍunu nitya Aḍeṁḍu biyamu yōgirālaku
pamaḍala śrīrāmaṁccicēṁ grayaniki gonnacēnu kaṁdruri tervu dakṣiṇāna
peddamuppināyuṁḍu gosaviyā rānaku Aḍeṁḍu biyyamu
ḍidonamōjjala varicēnu munuṁgacēla teruvuna krayādikoni peṭinadi
na 16 ne niyaḍamaraḍi Aḍeṁḍu taṁvyaḍu
biyyamu yōvirala paḍi siṁgarājubōlepeddicētanu krayādi goni pe
ṭina cēnu na 7 kāṭnēni kāmināyuḍu māneḍu biyyamu yōvirāla
paḍini peṭina cēnu na 1 baṭṭipōtināyuḍu māneḍu biyyamu yō
virāla paḍini mrakkapāṭi dēvanapeddicētanu koṁdakaṁciteruvu dakṣaṇa
nanu krayādi goni peṭina cēnu na 3 mācenappana māneḍu biyyamu yō
virānaku gārakaṁṭa kaḍuna peṭina cēnu na 4 . bammadēvanavayudyu
lu Aḍeḍu biyyamu yōvirāla paḍini babiḍapāṭi teruvuna
peṭina cēnu na 4 . rāmanatadēvarakunu vekurakaya kalapu suṁkamu
puvutōṁṭa yokaṭi cāgirājuṁgāru veṭṭina vritti cēnu
naṁdigāma teruvu Uttarāna kha 1 va 10
munumalapalli teruvu Irubaḍili kha 1
munagaceṟvu teruvu tūṟupuna Āpolāna peveḍigānu
ṁḍrūrigaḍasānula Appecētanu krayamu goni peṭina vritti
babiḷapāṭi teruvu tū¨rpuna cēnu na 4 Āpaḍumaṭanu
Digital edition of SII 10.295 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
